title: Fix Mixpanel alias call missing anonymousId parameter
description: The login flow in UserIdentificationTracker.tsx calls alias(user.id) without passing the anonymousId parameter. For proper Mixpanel identity merging, alias() must be called with both the userId and anonymousId (from the mp_anon_id cookie). Currently alias(user.id) is called but without the second parameter, so Mixpanel cannot properly merge the anonymous session with the identified user profile.
